description.value:
Benefit: Choose a Ninjutsu or Genjutsu technique subtype. You are treated as one level higher when per- forming techniques of that type, and gain a +1 enhancement bonus to your skill threshold for those techniques. You may choose Universal, which applies to all Ninjutsu or Genjutsu without a subtype.

Special: May be selected more than once, applying to a different subtype each time.
